content:
STAR ATLAS SUMMER begins TOMORROW

And it kicks off with COMMUNITY WEEK — a 6-day cosmic celebration where YOU take center stage.

What to expect?
Daily events,Ticket drops for the Carnival Raffle,New UE5 Game Update, Guild Battles (COPA), and the Joni Awards,$15,000 in prizes! + an Exclusive Community Week 2625 Badge,
Claim your Community Week role NOW! -> ⁠unknown
